# excavationcontractorinsurance.com

> Excavation Contractor Insurance by Contractors Choice Agency — commercial insurance specialists for excavation contractors, dirt work operators, trenching companies, grading contractors, land clearing businesses, and earthmoving companies.

## Owner
Contractors Choice Agency | Josh Cotner | 844-967-5247 | josh@contractorschoiceagency.com | Chandler, AZ 85249

## Services
- General Liability Insurance for Excavation Contractors
- Pollution Liability Coverage for Earthmoving Operations
- Workers Compensation for Excavation Crews
- Commercial Auto Insurance for Excavation Fleets
- Heavy Equipment Insurance (Inland Marine)
- Commercial Umbrella Coverage

## About
20+ years specializing in contractor insurance. Former contractor background. Licensed all 50 states. 15-minute quote turnaround. 2-hour claims response guarantee.
